message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

skinparam BoxPadding 30

actor Actor as actor1
participant EventBus as eventbus1

box "Service Orchestrator" #90EE90
participant "so" as so1 <<interface>>
end box

box "Software Defined Infrastructure" #BDB76B
participant "storageresource" as sr1
end box

actor1 -> so1 : Version Application Stack
so1 -> sr1 : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
sr1 ..> eventbus1 : data.list

so1 -> sr1 : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
sr1 ..> eventbus1 : data.list

actor Actor as actor2
participant EventBus as eventbus2

box "Service Orchestrator" #90EE90
participant "so" as so2 <<interface>>
end box

box "Software Defined Infrastructure" #BDB76B
participant "storageresource" as sr2
end box

@enduml
```
